data.body: PS11 failure #3 (581 default suite, all versions): 3 compaction-transparency tests (test_compact_negative/process_death) ADDED by concurrent main broke on my authorship_ledger (a compaction artifact in compiled state). FIXED: _semantic() normalizer in the 3 test files now strips authorship_ledger (like updated_at), folded into 580(v4). FULL local suite on current-main(d05288301) base: 5798 passed, 1 fail = known resolve_symbol flake ONLY — all concurrent interactions resolved (secret-detector, gen_cli _LADDER, authorship_ledger/_semantic). Re-pushed all 8 on d05288301. Awaiting green -> submit. Contention treadmill: main advanced 02d4->24e9->a252->affa->d052 (auto-lander f1fa draining queue); each rebase clean, fixed 3 real concurrent interactions + flakes along the way.
